patch.value: Docs index missing EXTENSION_AUTHOR_CONTRACTS + MIGRATION_CLI_SIMPLIFICATION links; migration note predates --pm-path

docs/README.md Documentation Map (:31-45) and Read Path do not link docs/EXTENSION_AUTHOR_CONTRACTS.md (only reachable via EXTENSIONS.md:15) or docs/MIGRATION_CLI_SIMPLIFICATION.md (only reachable via CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:162) — broken progressive disclosure for package authors and automation maintainers. Also docs/MIGRATION_CLI_SIMPLIFICATION.md:20-27,54 documents resolvePmRoot precedence as 'explicit --path' and recommends 'pass --path explicitly' without mentioning that --pm-path is now the preferred explicit flag and that explicit --path pointing at a project root is redirected to .agents/pm (PR#146, pm-ryik); CONFIGURATION.md:7-8,86-90 documents the current contract. Fix: add both pages to the docs map and add a one-line --pm-path update to the migration note.
Root discovery now documents --pm-path preferred flag + project-root redirect

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: docs/README.md Documentation Map now links EXTENSION_AUTHOR_CONTRACTS.md and MIGRATION_CLI_SIMPLIFICATION.md (fixing progressive-disclosure dead-ends). MIGRATION note updated to document --pm-path as the preferred explicit flag and the project-root->.agents/pm redirect (pm-ryik). Implemented in PR (docs accuracy & contributor-reference hardening). Verified: docs-skills-gate passed (relative links incl .toon validated), docs-skills-gate.spec + guide-command.spec + files-docs-command.spec = 66 passed, quality:static passed, manual temp-dir init confirms 11 builtins incl Plan and real dirs plans/schema/runtime (no index/).
